name: contagious-why-things-catch-on
description: Jonah Berger's guide to word-of-mouth and social transmission — the STEPPS framework explains why certain products, ideas, and stories go viral.
useCase: Learn the six principles of contagiousness (STEPPS) — Social Currency, Triggers, Emotion, Public, Practical Value, Stories — to make any product, idea, or campaign more shareable.
knownRisks: Principles may not apply equally across cultures
Viral success is not guaranteed by following steps alone
